MORGANBERSERKER-FAIRY_QUEEN_FORM_POWER.d: #Berserker (the reaper). When your Attack damages a cursed enemy, detonate it: consume all its Curse and deal bonus damage equal to the amount consumed. The first time you damage an enemy's HP each turn: gain 10 NP Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-FAIRY_QUEEN_FORM_POWER.s: #Berserker (the reaper). When your Attack damages a cursed enemy, detonate it: consume all its Curse and deal bonus damage equal to the amount consumed. The first time you damage an enemy's HP each turn: gain 10 NP Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-RAIN_WITCH_FORM_POWER.de: #Caster (the sower). Your cards that apply Curse apply 2 more, and Curse does not decay while you are in this form (pile it up). At the start of your turn: gain 8 NP Charge. Your Attacks deal 2 less damage.
MORGANBERSERKER-RAIN_WITCH_FORM_POWER.sm: #Caster (the sower). Your cards that apply Curse apply 2 more, and Curse does not decay while you are in this form (pile it up). At the start of your turn: gain 8 NP Charge. Your Attacks deal 2 less damage.
#Permanent climax: both reigns at once. Your Curse cards apply 2 more and Curse does not decay. When your Attack damages a cursed enemy, detonate it (consume all its Curse, deal that much bonus damage). The first time you damage HP each turn, gain 10 NP Charge; at the start of your turn, gain 8 NP Charge. No Attack penalty.

#Permanent climax: both reigns at once. Your Curse cards apply 2 more and Curse does not decay. When your Attack damages a cursed enemy, detonate it (consume all its Curse, deal that much bonus damage). The first time you damage HP each turn, gain 10 NP Charge; at the start of your turn, gain 8 NP Charge. No Attack penalty.
MORGANBERSERKER-NP_MANIFESTED_POWER.desc: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and the Queen's Sentence detonated every cursed enemy. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
